title: EdgeRock Capital LLC Sells 4,794 Shares of Apple Inc. $AAPL
sentences: EdgeRock Capital LLC Sells 4,794 Shares of Apple Inc. $AAPL EdgeRock Capital LLC reduced its stake in Apple Inc.
(NASDAQ:AAPL) by 15.1% in the third quarter, selling 4,794 shares and now owning 26,971 shares valued at $6.87 million.
Despite this sale, Apple remains the 17th largest holding for EdgeRock Capital LLC, making up 1.9% of its portfolio.
Other institutional investors have varied their positions, while analyst sentiment towards Apple remains "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $291.70.
